_login.1: On this portal, you can prepare for participation in the Eduwallet Pilot.
_login.2: Participation in the Eduwallet Pilot is by invitation only, so please check your email for this.
_login.3: If you have been here before, please log in directly.

1.title: Download an eduwallet app
1.description: To join the pilot, you need a wallet on your phone. Several wallets are available, all of them work.

2.title: Add your eduID
2.description: Your wallet needs a digital ID first. In education this is your eduID. Add it to your wallet.

3.title: Add your pilot participation
3.description: To join the pilot, you need proof. This comes as a pilot credential. Add it to your wallet too.

4.title: Data in the wallet
4.description: The data in the wallet can only be used during the pilot. After the pilot, all issued digital credentials in the wallet will expire.

_welcome.1: With eduwallet, we're exploring how a digital wallet on your mobile phone can help you store and share your academic results and other digital proofs, even after your studies.
_welcome.2: With a wallet for education, you can collect, prove, and share all your talents with one clever app.
_welcome.3: Go through the checklist below with 4 steps, so you are ready for the eduwallet pilot!

it_seems_like_you_are_not_signed_up_for_: It seems like you are not signed up for any pilot.
pilot_info_provided_by: The pilot information is provided by {institution}. Good luck.
ready_for_the_pilot: You are now ready for the pilot. You can always return to this page if you need to reinstall the wallet or re-add your eduID to your wallet.
thank_you_for_participating: Thank you for participating in a pilot with eduwallet! 🔥
